obligations.note: The runtime-positive survey fixture now executes through the shared kernel runtime.
Most one-shot survey fixtures now prove public protocol shape through build-zig-managed compile steps rather than a shell harness.
Compile-fail misuse fixtures now run through build-zig-managed expected-compile-error steps rather than a shell harness.
Prompt shell compactness is already independent of the public kernel runtime.
Default build/test wiring no longer adds stack-switch assembly files to the published kernel or retained proof lanes.
